debug_info.goal:
A : Type u_1
inst✝² : CommRing A
inst✝¹ : IsDomain A
inst✝ : @IsKrullDomain A inst✝² inst✝¹
⊢ IsIntegrallyClosed A

failed_attempts:
classical
  let K := FractionRing A
  let B : Set (Subalgebra A K) :=
    {S | ∃ p : PrimeSpectrum A, p.1.primeHeight = 1 ∧
      S = Localization.subalgebra (FractionRing A) p.1.primeCompl
        p.1.primeCompl_le_nonZeroDivisors}
  have hbiInf :
      sInf B = (⊥ : Subalgebra A K) := by
    have :
        (⨅ p ∈ {p : PrimeSpectrum A | p.1.primeHeight = 1},
            Localization.subalgebra (FractionRing A) p.1.primeCompl
              p.1.primeCompl_le_nonZeroDivisors) = (⊥ : Subalgebra A K) := by
      simpa using (IsKrullDomain.biInf_eq_bot (A := A) A)
    simpa [B, iInf_subtype] using this
  refine (isIntegrallyClosed_iff_eq_iInf_heightOneLocalization (A := A)).2 ?_
  simpa [iInf_subtype, hbiInf]

classical
  let K := FractionRing A
  refine (isIntegrallyClosed_iff.2 ?_)
  intro x hx
  by_contra hxA
  have hx' : Algebra.IsIntegral A x := hx
  have hne : x ≠ 0 := by
    intro hx0
    apply hxA
    simpa [hx0] using (algebraMap A K).map_zero
  let s : Set (PrimeSpectrum A) := {p : PrimeSpectrum A | p.1.primeHeight = 1 ∧ x ∈ (p.1 : Ideal A)}
  have hsfin : s.Finite := IsKrullDomain.finite (A := A) x (by
    intro hx0
    apply hne
    simpa [hx0] )
  have hs : s ⊆ {p : PrimeSpectrum A | p.1.primeHeight = 1} := by
    intro p hp; exact hp.1
  by_cases hsne : s.Nonempty
  ·
    have : x ∈ (⊥ : Subalgebra A K) := by
      have hbot := IsKrullDomain.biInf_eq_bot (A := A) A
      have : (⨅ p ∈ {p : PrimeSpectrum A | p.1.primeHeight = 1},
          Localization.subalgebra (FractionRing A) p.1.primeCompl p.1.primeCompl_le_nonZeroDivisors) = (⊥ : Subalgebra A K) := by
        simpa using hbot
      have hxmem :
          x ∈ (⨅ p ∈ {p : PrimeSpectrum A | p.1.primeHeight = 1},
            Localization.subalgebra (FractionRing A) p.1.primeCompl p.1.primeCompl_le_nonZeroDivisors) := by
        refine Subalgebra.mem_iInf.2 ?_
        intro p
        refine Subalgebra.mem_iInf.2 ?_
        intro hp1
        haveI := IsKrullDomain.isDiscreteValuationRing_localization (A := A) p hp1
        have : IsIntegrallyClosed (Localization p.1.primeCompl) := by
          infer_instance
        have hxloc : Algebra.IsIntegral (Localization p.1.primeCompl) (algebraMap K (FractionRing (Localization p.1.primeCompl)) x) := by
          exact hx'.map (algebraMap A (Localization p.1.primeCompl))
        have : algebraMap A K x ∈
            Localization.subalgebra (FractionRing A) p.1.primeCompl p.1.primeCompl_le_nonZeroDivisors := by
          simpa using (isIntegrallyClosed_iff.1 (by infer_instance) _ hxloc)
        simpa using this
      simpa [this] using hxmem
    apply hxA
    simpa using this
  ·
    have : s = ∅ := Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.1 hsne
    have : x ∈ (⊥ : Subalgebra A K) := by
      have hbot := IsKrullDomain.biInf_eq_bot (A := A) A
      simpa using (by
        have : (⨅ p ∈ {p : PrimeSpectrum A | p.1.primeHeight = 1},
            Localization.subalgebra (FractionRing A) p.1.primeCompl p.1.primeCompl_le_nonZeroDivisors) = (⊥ : Subalgebra A K) := by
          simpa using hbot
        exact by
          simpa [this] )
    apply hxA
    simpa using this

classical
  -- `Mathlib` already provides this instance for Krull domains.
  infer_instance

classical
  let K := FractionRing A
  classical
  -- Use the characterization: an element of the fraction field integral over `A` lies in every
  -- height-one localization, hence in their intersection which is `A`.
  refine ⟨fun x hx ↦ ?_⟩
  -- Let `x` be integral over `A`. Show `x ∈ A` by using the `biInf_eq_bot` condition.
  -- We work in the ambient algebra `A →+* K`.
  have hx' : IsIntegral A x := hx
  -- Show membership in each height-one localization subalgebra inside `K`.
  have hmem :
      x ∈ ⨅ p ∈ {p : PrimeSpectrum A | p.1.primeHeight = 1},
        Localization.subalgebra (FractionRing A) p.1.primeCompl
          p.1.primeCompl_le_nonZeroDivisors := by
    -- Membership in an infimum of subalgebras is pointwise membership.
    refine Subsemiring.mem_iInf.2 ?_
    intro p
    refine Subsemiring.mem_iInf.2 ?_
    intro hp
    -- In a DVR, hence integrally closed; the localization map sends an integral element to an
    -- integral element, so it lies in the image subalgebra.
    have : IsDiscreteValuationRing (Localization p.1.primeCompl) :=
      IsKrullDomain.isDiscreteValuationRing_localization (A := A) p hp
    have : IsIntegrallyClosed (Localization p.1.primeCompl) := by
      infer_instance
    -- The standard lemma: integral elements over the base land in the integrally closed subalgebra.
    simpa [Localization.subalgebra] using
      (isIntegral_iff_mem_integralClosure.mp (show IsIntegral A x from hx'))
  -- The infimum is `⊥`, hence `x ∈ ⊥`, i.e. `x ∈ A`.
  have : x ∈ (⊥ :
      Subalgebra A (FractionRing A)) := by
    simpa [IsKrullDomain.biInf_eq_bot (A := A)] using hmem
  simpa using this
